sections.draft_text: The Supplier must provide its pricing information as a separate attachment to the Quotation, marked 'Quotation Attachment A – Work Order Price & Payment Arrangements'. This attachment should include a detailed breakdown of costs, ensuring all figures are expressed in Australian legal units of measurement. The pricing schedule should be completed as specified in the tender documents, referencing annexes where required.

The Supplier acknowledges the requirement to complete and submit for Approval either an AIC Schedule or an AIC Plan, depending on the Work Order value. The Supplier confirms acceptance of the draft contract terms as outlined in the tender documents, with no proposed deviations.

The Supplier will ensure that all sustainment activities for eTools and DDM are conducted from a Physical Zone 3 or higher site, as certified under the Defence Security Principles Framework (DSPF). This approach aligns with the Commonwealth's security arrangements and ensures compliance with all relevant security protocols.

The Supplier will implement a robust project management methodology, incorporating regular Performance Reviews to assess and discuss performance against KPIs. Monthly meetings will be held to ensure alignment with the Commonwealth's expectations and to address any performance issues promptly.

The Supplier will provide comprehensive service management, including ITSM processes, SLAs, and escalation paths. Reports will be delivered in a format agreed upon with the Commonwealth, ensuring transparency and accountability in service delivery.

The Supplier's past performance and technical merit will be demonstrated through case studies that highlight successful delivery of similar services. These case studies will showcase the Supplier's ability to meet challenging timeframes and adapt to changes through innovation and continuous improvement.

Submission Requirements: Quotations must be lodged electronically via AusTender before the Closing Time. Intellectual Property Management: The Supplier must manage IP in accordance with clause 5 of the COD. Planning Obligations: The Supplier must provide each Plan as set out in the Work Order.
